---
title: "LRPGF05b: Gain factors for phonetic spelling (P), off-floor, treated-only"

date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Claude Code/Opus 4.8).
:::

::: {.callout-warning title="Warning: Preliminary model output"}

This model output is preliminary and likely to change as the model evolves and further data are received.

If the model was not fitted in "reporting" mode, the results will be more approximate than where additional sampling has been performed.

:::

```{python}
# | echo: false
import json
from pathlib import Path

import pandas as pd

_here = Path(".")
with open(_here / "config.json") as f:
    config = json.load(f)
factor_summary = pd.read_csv(_here / "factor_summary.csv")
```

## Overview

LRPGF05b is the **treated-only** companion to LRPGF05 (phonetic spelling, `spphon`),
restricted to on-intervention rows.

::: {.callout-important title="Off-floor likelihood; no treatment contrast"}

Phonetic spelling is heavily floored, so the likelihood is a **Bernoulli on the
off-floor indicator** (period post $> 0$). Restricted to on-intervention rows the
treatment indicator is constant and is dropped: this reports the **adjusted
associations** (own baseline, age, ability, skills L/B, age $\times$ ability) of
coming off the phonetic-spelling floor *among the treated*. All coefficients are
off-floor log-odds; under the DAG they are associations (GA-confounded), never
treatment effects. SES excluded (non-DAG / redundant).

:::

## Model

$$
(P_{\text{post}} > 0) \sim \operatorname{Bernoulli}(\operatorname{expit}(\eta)),\quad
\eta = \alpha + \alpha_{\text{period}} + \gamma_{\text{own}}\operatorname{logit}_*(P_{\text{pre}})
  + \gamma_A A_{\text{std}} + \gamma_{\text{ability}}z(\text{blocks})
  + \sum_{s\in\{L,B\}}\gamma_s\operatorname{logit}_*(s_{\text{pre}})
  + \gamma_{\text{int}}(\text{age}\times\text{ability}) + u_{\text{child}},
$$

on the on-intervention rows only (no `kappa` under the Bernoulli). Priors: shared template in `priors.py`.

![Model diagram](model_graph.svg){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

## Priors

![alpha](prior_alpha.svg){width=24%}
![gamma_own](prior_gamma_own.svg){width=24%}
![gamma_age](prior_gamma_age.svg){width=24%}
![gamma_cross](prior_gamma_cross.svg){width=24%}

## Prior-predictive check

![Prior predictive](prior_predictive_check.png){.lightbox}

## Sampling diagnostics

```{python}
# | echo: false
diag = pd.read_csv(_here / "diagnostics.csv", index_col=0)
diag
```

![Trace](trace_plot.png){.lightbox}

![Energy](energy_plot.png){.lightbox}

![Posterior](posterior_plot.png){.lightbox}

## Posterior-predictive check

![Posterior predictive](posterior_predictive_check.png){.lightbox}

## Findings

### Factor summary (off-floor log-odds, among the treated)

```{python}
# | echo: false
factor_summary
```

All terms are adjusted associations (no randomised contrast). Coefficients are off-floor log-odds; `mean`/`lo`/`hi` = posterior mean + equal-tailed 95% CrI; `prob_positive` = $P(\text{coef} > 0)$.

## LOO-PSIS

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
print("```\n" + open(_here / "loo.txt").read() + "\n```")
```

## Configuration

```{python}
# | echo: false
config
```
